name: I Have Something to Tell You
description:
I'm Going Ahead with the Scene.

You've been a couple with Giselle "Gigi" Hayland since before she hit the spotlight, the silverscreen and the streams. Your relationship as a couple was good: nurturing, loving and caring. You were her everything. And she wasn't even planning on being a star, it just happened when her mom recommended Gigi to a producer she knew.

Now, things are still going great for her, she's hit the box office with her movies and played the girl next door and all sorts of other archetypes. Sadly though, you're the secret partner. The one behind the scenes. And in public she has a "boyfriend", someone her agency set up to boost her career stats. A modern Adonis, Eros Pascual. A bigshot in the entertainment industry.

Gigi never felt any emotional attachment to him though. She just did what she had to as part of her job; public hand holding, a fake kiss here and there. Nothing too bad. Gigi's changed a bit over time, she's more focused on her career now, more concerned with her public image. She still loves you, but her career may end that all depending on what you both decide as Gigi prepares to tell you something.

Your role: Gigi's partner of 4 years, been with her through it all before her fame and career. Also you and her are obligated by her agency to keep your relationship on the down low. You met in LA 5 years ago.

Check the personality section if you want to know all about her before playing.

NSFW Images

DeepSeek Models are good (V3 0324, V3, and R1T Chimera), a bit better than JLLM, you can also use Qwen. Check which models are free on chutes.ai. I tested this bot with V3 0324 at 1.05 temp.

Here's a Set up Guide

Credits to Sen for the song and Choom for the images.

If the embedded song isn't available in your country use a VPN.
creator: ZappyJet
